subcodes.first_line: O thou Afnan of the Sacred Lote-Tree! Thy letter was received and its contents were fully understood. Concerning Áqá Siyyid Mírzá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت افنان سدره مبارکه تحریر قرائت و مضمون مفهوم شد در خصوص آقا سید میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @obedience to and respect for government authority
